name: Smothered Round Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the roast with half of the salt and pepper mixture.
2. Dust the steak on all sides with flour.
3. Heat oil in a Dutch oven or large heavy pot over medium-high heat.
4. Add the steak to the hot oil and brown well on all sides.
5. Remove the meat, leaving 1 teaspoon of oil in the pot.
6. Add half of the chopped onions, bell peppers, and celery.
7. Add the remaining seasoning blend and beef stock or water.
8. Stir the mixture thoroughly.
9. Reduce heat to the lowest possible setting.
10. Return the steak to the pot with the vegetables and cover.
11. Cook until the meat is very tender, about 1 hour and 15 minutes.
12. Serve slices of meat over rice with gravy poured on top.
When using different meats, adjust cooking times as needed for tenderness. For enhanced flavor, consider adding garlic slivers before serving.
